# freeswitch_gateway_status (Data Source)

Runtime status of a Sofia gateway (via ESL `sofia status gateway`).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Runtime status of a Sofia gateway (queried over ESL).
data "freeswitch_gateway_status" "provider_main" {
  profile = "external"
  name    = "provider-main"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)
- `profile` (String)

### Read-Only

- `attributes` (Map of String)
- `state` (String)
- `status` (String)
